content:
*무기 (모든 탄환 또는 근거리 무기), 고급* --- 이 무기는 존재하는 물질 중 가장 단단한 물질인 아다만틴으로 강화되어 있습니다. 이 무기나 탄환이 물체에 명중하면 [치명타](/1def7f5a1e8081169cceeaeccda91317?pvs=25)가 됩니다. --- ### 적용 가능한 무기 {color="yellow_bg"}
**이름** **피해** **속성** **전문**
*일반 근거리 무기*
[경량 망치](/1def7f5a1e8081419c03c5a5432aafcd?pvs=25) 1d4 타격 [경량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [투척](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (사거리 20/60) [얕은 공격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[곤봉](/1def7f5a1e808112b1add421874c7aca?pvs=25) 1d4 타격 [경량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [늦추기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[낫](/1def7f5a1e80813eac81c06599d01ee9?pvs=25) 1d4 참격 [경량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [얕은 공격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[단검](/1def7f5a1e80817f99b4e2fb8d5dadcc?pvs=25) 1d4 관통 [기교](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [경량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [투척](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (사거리 20/60) [얕은 공격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[대곤봉](/1def7f5a1e80813f9251c721c407c9aa?pvs=25) 1d8 타격 [양손](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [밀치기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[손도끼](/1def7f5a1e8081c1a8c5f7b6c6c9b864?pvs=25) 1d6 참격 [경량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [투척](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (사거리 20/60) [교란](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[육척봉](/1def7f5a1e8081f19375fd791747f01f?pvs=25) 1d6 타격 [다용도](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (1d8) [넘어뜨리기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[창](/1def7f5a1e80816c8152c68880c32263?pvs=25) 1d6 관통 [투척](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (사거리 20/60), [다용도](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (1d8) [제압](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[철퇴](/1def7f5a1e8081e9bc44da14a7710fce?pvs=25) 1d6 타격 - [제압](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[투창](/1def7f5a1e808146989cf63a19397984?pvs=25) 1d6 관통 [투척](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (사거리 30/120) [늦추기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
*군용 근거리 무기*
[기병창](/1def7f5a1e80816db1f6d6f9d48a0424?pvs=25) 1d10 관통 [중량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [간격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [양손](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (기승하지 않았을 때) [넘어뜨리기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[대검](/1def7f5a1e80813aa78acde0f2154761?pvs=25) 2d6 참격 [중량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [양손](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [빗겨치기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[대형 도끼](/1def7f5a1e8081ada0baeb631a045d1d?pvs=25) 1d12 참격 [중량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [양손](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [가르기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[대형 망치](/1def7f5a1e808120a6a0ea0a4d5222ce?pvs=25) 2d6 타격 [중량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [양손](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [넘어뜨리기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[도리깨](/1def7f5a1e8081f59a5ed82caab3683d?pvs=25) 1d8 타격 - [제압](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[레이피어](/1def7f5a1e808181b8aad1b7ccfc8379?pvs=25) 1d8 관통 [기교](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [교란](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[모닝스타](/1def7f5a1e80812aae69d40d5768a0e8?pvs=25) 1d8 관통 - [제압](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[미늘창](/1def7f5a1e80816184d4d6c3c7845c62?pvs=25) 1d10 참격 [중량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [간격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [양손](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [가르기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[삼지창](/1def7f5a1e8081e587fedee918f3d350?pvs=25) 1d8 관통 [투척](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (사거리 20/60), [다용도](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (1d10) [넘어뜨리기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[소검](/1def7f5a1e8081109485cf0b5c5287a4?pvs=25) 1d6 관통 [기교](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [경량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [교란](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[시미터](/1def7f5a1e8081ebb848d5500bdeef94?pvs=25) 1d6 참격 [기교](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [경량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [얕은 공격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[장검](/1def7f5a1e8081aba109e49025e5ee0e?pvs=25) 1d8 참격 [다용도](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (1d10) [제압](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[장창](/1def7f5a1e80819ab36cc66f710ccef3?pvs=25) 1d10 관통 [중량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [간격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [양손](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [밀치기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[전쟁 곡괭이](/1def7f5a1e808159ac59e97ad2b50d41?pvs=25) 1d8 관통 [다용도](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (1d10) [제압](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[전쟁 망치](/1def7f5a1e8081bb8bb0e3f77c9a8a7f?pvs=25) 1d8 타격 [다용도](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (1d10) [밀치기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[전투 도끼](/1def7f5a1e80819baaa2d40e001f8e0b?pvs=25) 1d8 참격 [다용도](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) (1d10) [넘어뜨리기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[채찍](/1def7f5a1e80817a880bf783e6d2bee3?pvs=25) 1d4 참격 [기교](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [간격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [늦추기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
[협도](/1def7f5a1e808189b625d16d9d1aeae8?pvs=25) 1d10 참격 [중량](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [간격](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25), [양손](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25) [빗겨치기](/1def7f5a1e80815c8946f62eb9f3ee2e?pvs=25)
